title: Datapack Error Viewer
description: See datapack loading errors in GUI
body:
This mod displays datapack loading errors in the game UI so that you don't have to open the log to see the error.

![Minecraft menu screen displaying datapack errors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I735j7KD/images/8c02449f3e458cade4ab6d0b52cbca05b43b6576.png)

Note this only applies to datapack files that prevent world load in vanilla, such as enchantments and painting variants. Files like tags and loot tables fail soft and don't prevent the world from loading, thus no screen is shown. This may be addressed in future releases.

Does nothing when connecting to multiplayer servers.
